news.t: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Its First Thematic ETFs in the U.S.

holdings.infoBox: PSWD is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Fortinet stock at 6.33%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 6.00%, Okta, Inc. at 5.95%, Palo Alto Networks at 5.82%, and Rubrik at 5.16%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Cybersecurity Select Equity ETF (PSWD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies globally that are engaged in the cybersecurity industry. The index screens securities based on various ESG criteria provided by Sustainalytics PSWD was launched on Jul 13, 2023 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: Solactive Cyber Security ESG Screened Index

data.title: Xtrackers by DWS Launches Its First Thematic ETFs in the U.S.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, one of the world's leading asset managers, announced today the listing of three new thematic exchange-traded funds (ETFs) designed to provide investors equity exposure ...
